description: Respond to an operator-challenge with a human-presence proof. The response is signed by the operator key, binding the nonce and proof together. Becomes the attestation message on validation.

args.name: nonce
args.description: Echoed from the challenge (must match exactly)

args.name: target_key
args.description: Echoed from the challenge (runtime MUST verify match)

args.name: contact_method
args.description: URI where the challenge was received

args.name: proof_provenance
args.description: Issuer signature or attestation for the proof
